machine_checks.action: Run scripts/audit_manuscript_package.py and fix package failures.
Use the provided acmart review manuscript documentclass.
Add or confirm the venue-required AI assistance disclosure.
Use the ACM acknowledgments environment if funding or institutional support is declared.

human_blockers.evidence: author, institution, or example email placeholders remain
human_blockers.action: Replace names, affiliations, cities/countries, emails, corresponding-author details, and shortauthors after supervisor confirmation.
Fill venue, dates, location, DOI, ISBN, copyright, and ACM reference metadata from the target venue.

human_blockers.evidence: source still asks to verify ACM CCS concepts
human_blockers.action: Confirm CCS concepts with the ACM CCS tool and supervisor before submission.
Replace the acknowledgments placeholder with final funding, institutional support, and supervisor acknowledgments, or remove it if not applicable.

human_blockers.evidence: AI assistance statement explicitly says it needs final venue-policy revision
human_blockers.action: Confirm whether the target venue requires, forbids, or provides specific wording for AI assistance disclosure.

human_blockers.evidence: documentclass does not include anonymous; target review policy is not confirmed
human_blockers.action: If the target venue is double-blind, add anonymous and remove identifying metadata from the review version.

human_blockers.evidence: source TODO asks for target-venue figure/reference confirmation
human_blockers.action: Confirm whether references, figure styling, and scope satisfy supervisor and target-venue expectations.

claim_boundary: This audit separates machine-verifiable package checks from student/supervisor submission decisions. A clean package is not the same as final submission readiness.
